name: pi-haiku
description_en: A warm, minimal theme plus a structured footer and keymap header replacement for Pi coding agent. Bundles the 'haiku' theme with a footer that surfaces location, model, context, tokens, cache, and cost — and a startup keymap that stays readable on any ter
description_zh: 一个温暖、简约的主题，加上结构化页脚和键映射页眉替换，用于 Pi 编码代理。将 'haiku' 主题与显示位置、模型、上下文、令牌、缓存和成本的页脚捆绑在一起，以及在任何终端上保持可读的启动键映射。
